wild_strike.name: Wild Strike
wild_strike.description: Setup/Builder: Strike with primal instinct. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Bond Pip.

tame_beast.name: Tame Beast
tame_beast.description: Setup: Bond with a creature or mark one for your pack. Generates 1 Bond Pip and applies [Marked].

bestial_wrath.name: Bestial Wrath
bestial_wrath.description: Payoff: Unleash the fury of your companion. Consumes 5 Bond Pips to increase companion damage by 50% for 10 ticks.

coordinated_kill.name: Coordinated Kill
coordinated_kill.description: Payoff: Strike the target simultaneously with your companion. Consumes 3 Bond Pips to deal combined Physical damage.

pack_bond.name: Pack Bond
pack_bond.description: Defense: Link your health with your companion. You both take 30% reduced damage as long as you are in the same room.

intimidating_roar.name: Intimidating Roar
intimidating_roar.description: Defense/Disruption: Your companion roars, stunning all nearby enemies for 2 ticks.

feral_leap.name: Feral Leap
feral_leap.description: Mobility: Leap across the battlefield with bestial agility.

call_companion.name: Call Companion
call_companion.description: Utility/Signature: Summon your primary animal companion to your side instantly.

beastmaster_physiology.name: Beastmaster Physiology
beastmaster_physiology.description: Passive: Pack Alpha. You gain 10% maximum Health and your companions have 15% increased Attack Speed.
